title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Colgate-Palmolive India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Colgate-Palmolive India has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Colgate-Palmolive India:
Colgate-Palmolive India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Colgate-Palmolive India!
